sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52517" key="kalamoglufe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλᾰμο-γλῠφέω</orth>, <sense id="n52517.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cut reeds, make pens</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.468</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
